scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn smart_badge_api.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.dev:worker: cd apps/api && uv run dramatiq smart_badge_api.task_queue
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check src/smart_badge_api tests
